scripts.test: pnpm run check:wit && node ../../scripts/ci/cargo-run.mjs test --lib && node ../../scripts/ci/cargo-run.mjs test --test ws_integration
scripts.lint: pnpm run check:wit && node ../../scripts/ci/cargo-run.mjs clippy -- -D warnings
scripts.lint:prepush: pnpm run check:wit && node ../../scripts/ci/cargo-run.mjs clippy --lib -- -D warnings
scripts.test:sidecar: pnpm run check:wit && node ../../scripts/ci/cargo-run.mjs test --lib sidecar_ --quiet
scripts.test:smoke:ws: pnpm run check:wit && node ../../scripts/ci/cargo-run.mjs test --test ws_integration ws_server_accepts_connection -- --exact --nocapture
scripts.test:smoke:health: pnpm run check:wit && node ../../scripts/ci/cargo-run.mjs test --bin tractor runtime_boot_probe_succeeds_in_memory_namespace -- --nocapture && node ../../scripts/ci/cargo-run.mjs test --bin tractor ws_probe_succeeds_when_daemon_is_listening -- --nocapture
scripts.test:integration: pnpm run check:wit && node ../../scripts/ci/cargo-run.mjs test --test ws_integration ws_server_accepts_connection -- --exact --nocapture
